_comment: LEGACY — For projects not using the plugin system. If using the plugin (recommended), hooks are auto-discovered from .claude-plugin/plugin.json via hooks/hooks.json. This file is kept for backwards compatibility with manual installations.
_instructions: Copy to .claude/settings.json in your project. Replace KIT_PATH with the absolute path to your SQWR Project Kit. For plugin-based installations, use hooks/hooks.json instead.

hooks._comment: CONTRACT-SECURITY §2 — blocks committing secrets (OWASP A02, NIST SP 800-63B)
AUDIT-DEPLOYMENT — blocks push if lint/build fails (pre-push only). Bypass: SQWR_SKIP_BUILD_CHECK=1
AUDIT-INDEX — reminds to run audit before push (advisory, never blocks)
CONTRACT-SECURITY §2 — warns on unsafe HTML injection without sanitization (OWASP A03: XSS)
All active contracts — warns on: excessive any types, @ts-ignore without comment, console.log, missing img alt, TODO/FIXME/HACK
